name: INTERGROUP CORP
business: InterGroup Corp owns and operates a 544-room Hilton hotel in San Francisco through its majority-owned subsidiary, along with sixteen apartment complexes, one commercial property, three single-family houses, and unimproved land. The company also invests in marketable securities including equity and debt instruments, and provides related-party financing to its subsidiary.

exposures.sentence: Properties include sixteen apartment complexes, one commercial real estate property and three single-family houses.
The Hotel is a full-service Hilton brand hotel pursuant to a Franchise License Agreement with HLT Franchise Holding LLC ( Hilton ) through January 31, 2030.
Cybersecurity risks could disrupt our operations and adversely affect our business, even though no material incidents have occurred.
